error_signature: The connection was aborted, perhaps the server is offline
title: Google Drive integration connection aborted
symptom: The workflow fails at the 'Upload PDF to Drive2' step with an error indicating the connection was aborted. This occurs after a short period of time using the Google Drive integration.
not_this_if: Using the built-in Google Drive node
Error does not occur after re-login
root_cause: The error occurs due to issues with the OAuth 2.0 token expiration or invalidation, which can happen if the Google project settings are not correctly configured or if there are issues with the Google API itself. This can lead to the connection being aborted unexpectedly.
fix_steps: Create a new Google Console project
Set up the Google Drive integration as a fresh instance
agent_instruction: Create a new Google Console project and set up the Google Drive integration anew.
